steps.title: Find the critics' concern
steps.content: The passage says critics are skeptical because it is too early to tell whether the specially cultivated trees can thrive in Bosco Verticale's unusual setting. Their concern is about the building's ability to support its plant life over time.

steps.title: Reject unsupported concerns
steps.content: A shifts to adapting the design outside Milan, which the text does not discuss. B invents a problem with plant variety. C brings up construction damage, which is never mentioned. The remaining choice restates the uncertainty about whether the plants can thrive. The answer is D.
